modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Smart cart computer in Fine Arts classroom needs updates.

full_description_text: The smart cart computer isn't up to date. It’s in the Fine Arts classroom. I noticed it needs some updates to work properly. Can someone take a look at it?
short_description: Smart cart computer in Fine Arts classroom needs updates.
description: The smart cart computer isn't up to date. It’s in the Fine Arts classroom. I noticed it needs some updates to work properly. Can someone take a look at it?
